## [00:00 - 01:07]

Welcome to Module 2 and this is where we dive deep into the nitty-gritty. This is all about getting people registered for your webinar. Obviously you want people on your webinar but before you can get them there you have to get them registered. So Don, tell us what's in store and why this is so critical. Okay, so this is critical because the more people you get to register tends to strongly influence the number of people that you're going to sell in the end. So we really want to maximize our registration process. So what we're going to do in this particular module is we're going to go through each of the elements of the registration process. This is a very conversational process. It's not just a, hey here's this thing, come sign up for the webinar. It's much more valuable if you do it as a conversation. So we're going to teach you exactly how to do that. You're going to put together each of the assets, the registration page, the thank you page, the email sequence, and perhaps even the ads that you're going to do to run these. And all in all you're going to work on creating strategic reasons for people to actually register and attend your webinar.
